description.value: Aura faint illusion; CL 1st; Slot head; Price 1,800 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This apparently normal hat allows its wearer to alter her appearance as with a disguise self spell. As part of the disguise, the hat can be changed to appear as a comb, ribbon, headband, cap, coif, hood, helmet, or other headwear. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells disguise self; Cost 900 gp. Hat of Disguise, Greater Aura faint illusion; CL 3rd; Slot head; Price 12,000 gp; Weight â lbs. DESCRIPTION Like a hat of disguise, this garment allows its wearer to alter her appearance. It functions as an alter self spell (as opposed to disguise self ). The hat becomes a part of the disguise and can be a hat, a helmet, a headscarf, and so forth. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells alter self; Cost 6,000 gp.
